decision.reason: profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_serial_bridge must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
